title: Wellness CORE Puppy Trainers, Treats for Dog Training, Natural Grain-Free Training Snacks, High Meat Content, Ideal Rewards for Puppies, 170g
features: FRESH MEAT AS MAIN INGREDIENT: Our Wellness CORE Puppy Trainers contain fresh chicken as the main ingredient. These treats are also naturally hypoallergenic, making them perfect for every puppy. A healthy treat after a good training session!
GUILT-FREE TREATS: Give your puppy our delicious treats without feeling guilty about their health! Our Wellness CORE Puppy Trainers are only 3 kcal per treat. Delicious and healthy!
BRAIN AND EYE DEVELOPMENT: Our Wellness CORE Puppy Trainers will stimulate the brain and eye development of your furry friend thanks to the amount of DHA from the salmon oil used in our product.
STRONG IMMUNE SYSTEM: The puppy treats contain all the vitamins, minerals, and high-quality antioxidants that your puppy needs, creating a strong immune system!
PERFECT FOR TRAINING: These puppy treats are perfect for your puppy’s training sessions due to their ideal size and crunchy texture. A delicious reward after a day full of new tricks!
